name: Patient 41
history: Complex relationship history affecting social circle. Often takes caretaking role with friends, including friend with ongoing medical issues.
intermediate_belief: I have to be available for everyone who needs me.
intermediate_belief_depression: My own needs always come last because I'm the caretaker.
coping_strategies: Overcommitting, running late, prioritizing others' needs.
situation: Running late for appointments and social gatherings, including therapy and lunches with friends.
auto_thought: I'm letting everyone down by being late, but I can't say no to anyone.
